summary.author: Jared Broad

summary.description_full:
The strategy systematically harvests equity index constituent option risk premia by selling out of the money put options on a liquid basket of US large cap equities. Each month it forms a universe of the 15 highest dollar volume stocks available in the fundamental feed (intended to represent the most liquid constituents) and initiates short put positions with approximately 45 days to expiration. For each underlying, it selects a put strike below spot, biased toward a relatively near the money contract (approximately the 10th percentile of available below spot strikes), which results in a modest out of the money short put exposure that benefits from time decay and typically elevated implied volatility versus realized volatility.

Trades are initiated at month start, 30 minutes after the SPY market open, and positions are monitored daily at the same time. Risk is controlled via diversification across 15 underlyings and fixed position sizing of 2 short put contracts per underlying, with no volatility targeting or notional caps. Positions are exited mechanically by buying back the option when time to expiry falls to 15 days or less, limiting late cycle gamma and assignment risk, after which the strategy waits for the next scheduled monthly rebalance to re enter. Decisions are made on daily data with option chains queried at trade time.

raw.name: Monthly Liquid Large-Cap Short Puts

author.name: Jared Broad
author.bio: We are pioneering the radically future for open-source quant finance. QuantConnect is the world's largest quant community, empowering more than 400,000 quants with a framework, data, and infrastructure for their investments.

raw.description:
The strategy systematically harvests equity index constituent option risk premia by selling out of the money put options on a liquid basket of US large cap equities. Each month it forms a universe of the 15 highest dollar volume stocks available in the fundamental feed (intended to represent the most liquid constituents) and initiates short put positions with approximately 45 days to expiration. For each underlying, it selects a put strike below spot, biased toward a relatively near the money contract (approximately the 10th percentile of available below spot strikes), which results in a modest out of the money short put exposure that benefits from time decay and typically elevated implied volatility versus realized volatility.

Trades are initiated at month start, 30 minutes after the SPY market open, and positions are monitored daily at the same time. Risk is controlled via diversification across 15 underlyings and fixed position sizing of 2 short put contracts per underlying, with no volatility targeting or notional caps. Positions are exited mechanically by buying back the option when time to expiry falls to 15 days or less, limiting late cycle gamma and assignment risk, after which the strategy waits for the next scheduled monthly rebalance to re enter. Decisions are made on daily data with option chains queried at trade time.

changes: Initial deployment for strategy "Monthly liquid large-cap short puts".
